headline.zh-CN: 修复 Checklist 设置重启恢复开启
headline.en: Fixes checklist settings after backend restarts

summary.zh-CN: 后端启动时的历史数据填充会保留已关闭的专辑和社团 Checklist 设置，避免部署或重启后又恢复为开启。
summary.en: Backend startup backfill now preserves disabled album and circle checklist settings, preventing deploys or restarts from turning them back on.

title.zh-CN: 关闭的 Checklist 会保持关闭

description.zh-CN: 启动兼容逻辑只会补齐缺失的旧数据空值，不再覆盖主催已经关闭的专辑 Checklist 和社团默认 Checklist。
description.en: Startup compatibility logic now only fills missing legacy null values and no longer overwrites album checklist or circle default checklist settings that producers already disabled.
